caption: A man sits in a recording studio wearing a white baseball cap, a black hoodie with the word "BOSS" printed on the chest, and over-ear headphones. He is positioned behind a desk with a professional microphone on a boom arm in front of him. The background features white panels with gold stars and the word "HUSTLE" printed repeatedly. A blue sign behind him reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". A small black container on the desk displays the text "BOSS Talk Out Loud". In the sequence, the man is speaking, with his mouth opening and closing and his gaze shifting slightly. He remains seated in the same position throughout the clip, while the camera angle stays fixed. A circular logo with the text "BOSS Talk" is visible in the bottom left corner of each frame.
